business.name: AAA Plumbing Service LLC
business.tagline: Fast fixes, fair prices — when you need us most

hero.headline: *Emergency plumbing repairs* when Savannah calls — 24/7
hero.subheadline: Burst pipes, clogged drains, water heater failures — we're there in under 90 minutes with upfront pricing and guaranteed workmanship.

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: Complete Plumbing Solutions
services_section.subheading: From leaky faucets to major pipe repairs, we handle it all

services.title: Emergency Drain Cleaning
services.description: Severe clogs, backed-up sinks, toilet blockages — we clear them fast with professional equipment and restore your flow within the hour.

services.title: Water Heater Repair & Install
services.description: No hot water? Leaking tank? We diagnose the issue, repair when possible, or install new units with same-day service throughout Savannah.

services.title: Pipe Leak Detection & Repair
services.description: Hidden leaks, burst pipes, low water pressure — we locate the problem with advanced tools and provide lasting repairs that won't fail again.

services.title: Toilet & Fixture Replacement
services.description: Running toilets, dripping faucets, outdated fixtures — complete installation and repair services with quality parts and clean workmanship.

services.title: Sewer Line Services
services.description: Main line backups, tree root intrusion, old clay pipes — camera inspection and trenchless repair options to get your system flowing.

about.heading: Serving Savannah's Plumbing Needs Since Day One
about.body: AAA Plumbing Service has been Savannah's go-to emergency plumber for years. We know the unique challenges of coastal Georgia plumbing — from hurricane damage to aging Historic District pipes. Our team responds fast, works clean, and stands behind every repair with real guarantees.

reviews.name: Marcus T.
reviews.text: Called AAA at 2 AM when our main line backed up into the house. They were here in 45 minutes and had it cleared by sunrise. Pricing was exactly what they quoted over the phone.

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: Water heater died on a Friday — they came out same day and installed a new one for less than the big companies wanted. Clean work, no mess left behind.

reviews.name: Robert K.
reviews.text: Had a mysterious leak behind our kitchen wall. They found it with their camera equipment and fixed it without tearing up the whole wall. Impressive problem-solving.

service_areas.label: SERVICE COVERAGE
service_areas.heading: Fast Response Across the Coastal Empire
service_areas.subheading: 24/7 emergency service to these Savannah-area communities

cta.heading: Plumbing Emergency? We're Ready Now
cta.body: Don't let a small leak become major damage. Call AAA Plumbing for immediate response and honest pricing throughout Savannah.
